title.en: After the mid-tier immeasurable lifeform comple...

content.en:
After the mid-tier immeasurable lifeform completes nine life reforges, as long as other conditions are met, it can impact the high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

However, this success rate is not 100%, under normal circumstances, it is only three or four percent, and once the impact fails, the body will be unstable, resulting in a lower success rate for the second impact.

And if there is a piece of Hailou Tianjin, you can absorb the power of Hailou Tianjin, and forcibly break through to the realm of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, the success rate is 100%, even if you deliberately fail to break through, there will be no sequelae.

Even the mid-level immeasurable lifeforms that had failed to break through could forcibly break through to the realm of high-level immeasurable lifeforms with the help of Hailou Tianjin.

In addition, Hailou Tianjin can also be used for the cultivation of immeasurable bodies.

For example, Ye Tian's superior immeasurable body, Wuji body, had already cultivated to the Xiaocheng realm, and it was very difficult to ascend to the Dacheng realm.

If there is no special chance, there is not much hope before becoming a high-level immeasurable life form.

But with Hailou Tianjin, you can raise the Infinite Body to the realm of Dacheng.

If there is enough Hailou Heavenly Gold, it can even raise the Infinite Body to the perfection realm.

Of course, using Hailou Heavenly Gold to enhance the Infinite Body is undoubtedly too extravagant.

If those forces get it, it is impossible to use it to cultivate middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, but to use it for themselves, because it can help many high-level immeasurable lifeforms break the shackles, and even high-level immeasurable lifeforms like the Void Whale Overlord are of great use.

"It's still too far for me to be promoted to the level of the Void Whale Overlord, and I now have a lot of Hailou Gold, which is directly fused into Hailou Heavenly Gold to enhance my Infinite Body!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently, he fused those sea building gold, and fused these sea building gold one by one to become sea tower Tianjin.

"Retreat and practice first, and elevate the infinite body to the realm of Dacheng. If I succeed in breaking through, my strength will skyrocket!"

Immediately, Ye Tian let his true body copy the body and refine these sea towers and heavenly gold.

Just a piece of Hailou Heavenly Gold had allowed Ye Tian to refine for a long time, and as he continued to refine, his Infinite Body was also making rapid progress.

"A piece of sea gold is not enough!"

Ye Tian continued to refine the Hailou Heavenly Gold, refining three pieces of Hailou Heavenly Gold before he finally cultivated the Infinite Body to the peak realm of Xiaocheng, and there was only one step left before the realm of Dacheng.

"Refining another piece of Hailou Heavenly Gold, you should be able to break the shackles and raise the Infinite Body to the Dacheng realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.

So, Ye Tian took another piece of Hailou Heavenly Gold to impact the Infinite Body of the Dacheng Realm.

Little by little, time passed.

Rumble!!!!

The shackles in the underworld were completely shattered with the help of Hailou Tianjin, and the Infinite Body officially stepped into the Dacheng realm, and the body began to transform, and the aura soared a lot.

At this moment, Ye Tian's combat power skyrocketed!

Subsequently, Ye Tian found that it was much easier to reforge the life level, obviously because of the benefits brought by the Infinite Body after breaking through the Dacheng realm.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian went all out to carry out the cultivation of life recasting and the Infinite Body.

He is not afraid of wasting Hailou Tianjin, increasing his strength is the most important thing now, he doesn't believe that he will not be able to obtain Hailou Gold in the future.

Therefore, he didn't care at all about the consumption of these sea mansions.

In this way, the first year of hundreds of thousands of realms passed.

this day.

Ye Tian successfully completed the ninth life reforge, and the Infinite Body also successfully broke through to the realm of perfection.

"The speed of progress is too fast, if other mid-level immeasurable lifeforms know that I have completed nine life reforges so quickly, they will definitely be confused!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, he has a large number of different golden sand and golden dragon stone recipes, so he has a steady stream of golden dragon stones, and it is too easy for him to reforge the life level.

Nine life reforges are not difficult, but the most difficult thing is the tenth life reforge.

"Although I have been using the golden dragon stone containing different golden sands to reforge the life level, and I have the potential to carry out the tenth life reforge, it does not mean that the reforge success can be reforged, it will take a long time!"

Ye Tian prepared a large number of golden dragon stones, and constantly refined these golden dragon stones to impact the tenth life reforge.

Ye Tian also probed a lot of information about the tenth life recast, but there was very little information about this aspect, after all, there were too few great ancestors who could do the tenth life reforge, and there were probably not many in the entire Xuanqi Realm.

Ye Tian is not afraid of danger, anyway, even if the breakthrough fails, it will not affect him, even if this replica body is useless, he can copy another replica body and make a breakthrough again.

Time passed, and Ye Tian really felt the difficulty of impacting the tenth life reforge, and maybe there was a better way to reforge the tenth life level.

However, Ye Tian didn't know this method.

He had also thought about joining a certain big force, but after learning about the situation of those forces in the Xuanqi Zero Realm, he dispelled this idea.

No matter which force you join, there is no way to not be trusted at all.

After all, those resources are there, and any talent is meaningless, and without resources, any talent is empty talk.

Therefore, those forces will not cultivate foreign Great Ancestors, unless they have really made a lot of contributions.

Therefore, it is his burden to join those forces.

As for inheritance, he doesn't really need it.

After a long time, Ye Tian relied on the golden dragon stone to forcibly impact the tenth life recast, and he relied on this method to slowly boil through, he didn't believe that he couldn't break through.

Finally, with the help of a large number of golden dragon stones, Ye Tian finally completed the tenth life reforge.

Maybe this method is a waste of golden dragon stones, and those big forces can't afford it, but this is undoubtedly the safest and most stable method.

Rumble!!!!

The transformation of the tenth life reforge was too great, perhaps not as good as the transformation brought by breaking through the high-level immeasurable lifeforms, but it was enough to make his strength reach an incredible level.

This transformation lasted for a long time, and it also consumed Ye Tian's countless resources.

But in the end, after the tenth life reforge was completed, Ye Tian's strength had far surpassed before.

......

"Boom!"

Ye Tian flicked a finger, and the immeasurable Xuanbi was directly shattered.

"It's a pity, this kind of thing like the Infinite Xuanbi can't test the strength of my one-finger attack anymore!" Ye Tian muttered.
